[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / clear

# Method: clear()

```ts
clear(): void;
```

Clear the layer currently drawing to.

Used to clear the layer at the start of its drawing cycle.

## Returns

`void`

## Example
